name: casenode
description: UK case law research over the CaseNode corpus. Bundles the CaseNode MCP connection with skills for cite-checking a draft, researching an area of law, tracing how a case has been treated, validating citations, and summarising a case.

api_key.title: CaseNode API key
api_key.description: Your CaseNode API key. Create one at casenode.ai under Settings, then API keys. Anyone with the key can query the corpus on your behalf, so keep it secret.
